sizing_rule.note: Optimal f inversely proportional to sigma distance from mean (optimal_f ∝ 1/σ). Position size decreases as distribution parameters extend into tail risk zones (3σ through 10+σ). Use fitted distribution model rather than raw data to reduce spurious inflection points.

source_rule_text: Position size should be reduced (optimal f approaches 0) as distribution parameters move further from the mean, with position sizing inversely related to the sigma distance from expected value to account for tail risk.
